_note: DEATH-BY-HP-WRITE TEST (any target) - HP=0 ALONE. Same as death-test.json but AffectAllies=true so our HP=0 write fires on ANY target the player hits (ally OR foe). Used because the tester deliberately attacks their own allies to generate damage faster. REQUIRES a NEUTERED attack (basic weapon Attack) so vanilla is non-lethal and OUR write is what zeroes the target; do NOT use un-neutered specials (Cloud Limit / Fire / ninja Throw) for this test or vanilla may kill first and confound it. CauseDeathOnZeroHp is OFF: this tests whether writing HP=0 ALONE kills or leaves a zombie. If zombie, switch to the killflag variant (sets struct +0x61 |= 0x20).

DeathStateWrites.Name: KO-0x61-bit0x20
DeathStateWrites._mask_hex: 0x20 = 32 dec (bit found in Test 2a, set on every death)
